title: Christmas Craft Pack 2024
description: A pack made for our friend groups annual christmas minecraft server. posted for ease of access.
body:
**This Modpack was created for usage during the 2024 Christmas Season for a Server.** It is a _Kitchen Sink Modpack_ meaning that there is not a theme of the mods chosen for the pack and that they are all there for fun and entertainment purposes.

The modpack includes mods like Create for its large addon pool and multiple compatibilities with other mods. It also includes food mods like Farmers Delight and an assortment of other Addons to add more varities of foods and compatibility with other mods. There is also a plethora of Performance mods to counteract the amount of mods that may cause frame drops.

There are an assortment of biome generation mods like Tectonic and Cascades, to help expand alot of the world generation. Some biome mods like Natures spirit and Geophilic which adds beautiful yet simple biomes, as well as touching up some vanilla biomes that fit in well with the generation. 

Some mods that add more animals include Naturalist and Spawn, as they dont add to much but can spruce up the worlds wildlife population. Mods like More Mob Variants to add some nice re-textures of existing mobs for extra flavor. 

And of course a plethora of Snow, Winter, and Festive mods for that Christmas Cheer. It also includes some texture packs and shaders for people to add even more of that Holiday Spirit to their games.
